title.en: Management of intra- and post-procedural EMR bleeding

description.en: Recognition of significant intraprocedural bleeding, choice and safe deployment of haemostatic modalities (snare-tip soft coagulation, coagulation forceps, clips, thermal therapy), and management of clinically significant post-EMR bleeding.

criteria.en: Recognises significant bleeding; selects a haemostatic modality with prompting.
Independently controls intraprocedural bleeding; manages post-EMR bleeding without escalation in ≥90 % of cases.
Teaches the technique; manages refractory bleeding; coordinates multidisciplinary response when required.
